name: Dedra Meero
description: During the reign of the Galactic Empire, the human female Dedra Meero served with the military rank of lieutenant in the Imperial Security Bureau. She was part of the Enforcement branch before transferring to Investigations. Eventually, Meero was promoted to an ISB Supervisor in charge of two sectors, including the locations of Steergard and Sev Tok, and joined the ranks of the ISB Board, a collection of different supervisors who delivered informative reports from their respective sectors to Major Lio Partagaz in the ISB Central Office building on the Imperial capital planet Coruscant.
creator: Nellika Fujen
